zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Cheyne於大約1140年出生在英國英格蘭素可時，她的父親John de Caisneto Cheyne47歲，母親Sybil Elizabeth41歲。她於1180年與Geoffrey de Saye I在英國肯特韋斯特 馬林結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1198年之前在英國英格蘭肯特多福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Cheyne于大约1140年出生在英国英格兰素可时，她的父亲John de Caisneto Cheyne47岁，母亲Sybil Elizabeth41岁。她于1180年与Geoffrey de Saye I在英国肯特韋斯特 馬林结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1198年之前在英国英格兰肯特多福。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Cheyne was born about 1140, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Caisneto Cheyne, was 47 and her mother, Sybil Elizabeth, was 41. She married Geoffrey de Saye I in 1180, in West Malling, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 1198, in Dover, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Cheyne est née environ 1140, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Caisneto Cheyne, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Sybil Elizabeth, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey de Saye I en 1180, à West Malling, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1198, à Dover, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Cheyne um 1140 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Caisneto Cheyne 47 und ihre Mutter Sybil Elizabeth 41. Sie hat 1180 in West Malling, Kent, England Geoffrey de Saye I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1198 in Dover, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Cheyne è nata il circa 1140 nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Caisneto Cheyne, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Sybil Elizabeth, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey de Saye I nel 1180, nel West Malling, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1198, nel Dover, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Cheyneが約1140年にイギリスイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父John de Caisneto Cheyneは47歳，母Sybil Elizabethは41歳であった。1180年にイギリスケントウエスト マリングでGeoffrey de Saye Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1198年以前にイギリスイギリスケントドバーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Cheyne(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Caisneto Cheyne(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil Elizabeth(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1180년 영국 켄트 웨스트 맬링에서 Geoffrey de Saye I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1198년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 도버에서 사망했다.

mn.Dover, Kent, England: Dover, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Cheyne nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Caisneto Cheyne, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Elizabeth, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey de Saye I em 1180, em West Malling, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 1198, em Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Cheyne родилась около 1140 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Caisneto Cheyne было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil Elizabeth, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey de Saye I в 1180 г. в местности вест маллинг, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1198 г. в местности довир, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Cheyne nació aproximadamente 1140, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Caisneto Cheyne, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Sybil Elizabeth, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Geoffrey de Saye I en 1180, en West Malling, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1198, en Dover, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
